subject: nsys profile attempt: exit -1 root cause + corrected script
body: Your nsys test used --trace=none which disables ALL tracing. nsys exits -1 with no output when nothing is traced. Use --trace=cuda instead. Also --sample=none and --cpuctxsw=none are fine (skip CPU sampling which needs admin). Correct command: nsys profile -t cuda --sample=none --cpuctxsw=none -x true --force-overwrite=true --stats=true -o S:\kernel-lane\profiles\nsys\baseline S:\kernel-lane\build\Release\profile_target.exe
evidence: Archivist test: nsys exit -1 with --trace=none, no output files
Root cause: --trace=none disables all tracing, nsys has nothing to collect
Fix: use --trace=cuda for CUDA kernel profiling
